bird.name: Kaempfer's tody-tyrant
bird.summary: Kaempfer's tody-tyrant (Hemitriccus kaempferi) is a rare species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is native to…

locations.name: Serra do Mar coastal forests
locations.summary: The Serra do Mar coastal forests is an ecoregion of the tropical moist forests biome.

locations.name: 常綠森林
locations.summary: 常綠森林是由常綠樹木組成的森林。它們出現在廣泛的氣候帶中，包括寒冷氣候中的針葉樹和冬青樹等樹木，溫帶地區的桉樹、活橡樹、金合歡和班克樹，以及熱帶地區的雨林樹木。針葉溫帶常綠森林最常以科中的物種為主。樹木包括：松科和柏科。闊葉溫帶常綠森林包…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Kaempfer's tody-tyrant
relations.evidence: It is native to the Serra do Mar coastal forests

relations.subject: Kaempfer's tody-tyrant
relations.evidence: |date=2025 |website=Data Zone |publisher=BirdLife International |access-date=January 28, 2025 }} It is native to the Serra do Mar coastal forests, where it inhabits tropical evergreen forest, early-stage secondary forest, and open low-stature woodland
